notes: Two-location practice (Lincoln Park Chicago + Schaumburg); Schaumburg address (501 W Golf Rd, Ste B) and phone (847-805-6202) match the record exactly. A careers page exists but currently lists no open positions, only roles they typically hire for (dentists, hygienists, assistants, front office). Doctor roster (Arora, Saad, Gajendrareddy) found on the site's provider pages. No DSO/PE affiliation stated; appears to be a small independent 2-location group.

owner_operator_stated: Bowdental of Evanston is led by a husband-and-wife team, Dr. Adeniji Bowden and Dr. Danielle Duarte, per bowdentalevanston.com — this is a different entity than the record's 'Dental Health Care Ltd'.
notes: The record entity 'Dental Health Care Ltd' at 2611 Broadway Ave, Evanston (address matches exactly) is now operating as 'Bowdental of Evanston,' a completely different practice name, led by Dr. Bowden and Dr. Duarte. Website phone (847-532-2688) also differs from the record's (847-475-8700). No web presence found for 'Dental Health Care Ltd' still active at this address — treated as a successor/practice-sale scenario, not the named entity.

owner_operator_stated: Northshore Dental Partners PLLC is owned/co-founded by Dr. Marcos Montoya and Dr. Rares Raibulet — a different entity than the record's 'Dan J Nykaza DDS Ltd'; Nykaza's name persists only in legacy directory listings and the old domain's page title.
notes: The vendor hint domain nykazadds.com 302-redirects to northshoredentalpartners.com. Address (2200 Central St) AND phone ((847) 869-7710) match the record exactly, but the practice has been rebranded/sold: it is now 'Northshore Dental Partners PLLC,' owned by Dr. Montoya and Dr. Raibulet, not Dan J. Nykaza. Legacy directory listings still title the practice 'Dan J. Nykaza, DDS, LTD.' — a clear successor/practice-sale scenario, not a same-owner rebrand.

owner_operator_stated: Heather M. Miller, DDS is listed on the practice site as Dentist/Practice Owner.
notes: Address (2805 Central Street, Evanston, IL 60201) matches the record exactly. Website phone (847-328-8500) differs from the record's (224-420-7022), but the sole listed doctor, Heather M. Miller DDS, matches the record's practitioner name exactly and is stated as practice owner, so this is treated as the same practice with an updated/secondary phone line. Single-provider independent practice, no DSO affiliation stated, no careers page found.

Multi-location group brand 'Webster Dental Care' (webdentalchicago.com), 8-10 Chicagoland locations, 60+ doctors, 200+ staff, ~49 years in business. Vendor hint 'Asboralsurg.com' was unrelated/wrong (an oral-surgery site) and did not corroborate; the real site was found via search. Website phone (847-492-3492) differs from the record's (847-869-9303), but the street address (500 Davis St, Suite 601, Evanston, IL 60201) matches exactly and the practice name matches the record's brand exactly, so treated as the same corporate location, not a conflict. A current opening for Registered Dental Hygienist at the Evanston location was found via Glassdoor (the company's own Paylocity careers portal page did not render a job list directly). No named doctor roster could be corroborated specifically for this location.

The practice's own website (shermandental.org, matching the vendor hint) timed out on repeated fetch attempts (homepage on both https/http, contact-us page, location page) — appears dead/unreachable, so it could not be corroborated per the kill rule (no page on the site itself could be loaded to confirm address/phone). Third-party directories (Yelp, Healthgrades, CareCredit) independently list 'Sherman Dental Associates of Evanston' at 909 Davis St Suite 120, Evanston, IL 60201, phone (847) 475-6300 — an exact address+phone match to the record — and mention the practice has been run by 'Doctors Monaghan and Le' since 2004, but since this could not be verified on the practice's own (unreachable) site, it is not included as a sourced roster entry.
